items.definition_en: Couscous is tiny steamed balls made from crushed wheat.
items.example_en: She served chicken on a bed of couscous.

items.definition_en: Bulgur is whole grain wheat that is boiled, dried, and cracked.
items.example_en: Bulgur is commonly used in Middle Eastern salads.

items.definition_en: Granola is a crunchy mix of baked oats, nuts, and honey.
items.example_en: He eats granola with yogurt every morning.

items.definition_en: Rye bread is dark bread made mostly from rye flour.
items.example_en: The café offers sandwiches with rye bread.

items.definition_en: Spelt is an ancient grain related to wheat.
items.example_en: Spelt is becoming popular in healthy diets.

items.definition_en: Sourdough is bread made with a fermented dough starter.
items.example_en: She loves sourdough for its tangy flavor.

items.definition_en: A crouton is a small cube of fried or baked bread.
items.example_en: She added croutons to the salad for crunch.

items.definition_en: Matzo is a flat, unleavened bread used during Passover.
items.example_en: They bought matzo for the holiday meal.

items.definition_en: Cornmeal is ground dried corn used in baking and cooking.
items.example_en: She dusted the baking tray with cornmeal.

items.definition_en: Bran is the hard outer layer of cereal grains.
items.example_en: He adds bran to his cereal for extra fiber.

items.definition_en: Wholemeal bread is bread made from whole grain flour.
items.example_en: Wholemeal bread is healthier than white bread.

items.definition_en: White bread is made from refined wheat flour.
items.example_en: Children often prefer white bread sandwiches.

items.definition_en: Semolina is coarse flour made from durum wheat.
items.example_en: Semolina is used to make traditional puddings.

items.definition_en: A crumpet is a small, round, spongy British bread.
items.example_en: He likes his crumpet toasted with butter.

items.definition_en: A wrap is a soft thin flatbread rolled around fillings.
items.example_en: She ate a chicken and veggie wrap for lunch.

items.definition_en: Multigrain bread is made from two or more types of grain.
items.example_en: Multigrain bread is a common choice for sandwiches.

items.definition_en: Focaccia is a flat Italian yeast bread with olive oil.
items.example_en: Focaccia tastes great with tomatoes and herbs.

items.definition_en: Naan is a soft, leavened flatbread served in Indian cuisine.
items.example_en: He ordered curry with naan on the side.

items.definition_en: Pumpernickel is a dense, dark German rye bread.
items.example_en: Pumpernickel is known for its intense flavor.

items.definition_en: Farro is an ancient wheat grain used in salads and soups.
items.example_en: She made a hearty salad with farro and vegetables.
